name: Mom's Gefilte Fish
recipeIngredient: 2 Pounds Fish Fillets (Pickerel & Whitefish, or Pike)
Head, Skin, Bones from Fish (if available)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the fish: Salt the fillets and let them stand for about 15 minutes. Rinse the fillets. Process or grind the fish with onion until smooth. Add seasonings, water, oil, eggs, and matzo meal to the mixture. Mix well. Shape into patties and fry in hot oil until nicely browned. Moist hands will help shape the patties.
2. Prepare the stock: Place the fish patties and vegetables at the bottom of a large pot. Add any available fish bones. Pour water over the ingredients to cover, then add seasonings and margarine. Cover and simmer for about 2 hours. The fish can be made into patties beforehand if desired. Remove carefully from the stock and arrange on a platter with vegetables around it. Serve hot or cold with horseradish.
